prose: Make a fish mouth with your hand by opening and closing your fingers and thumb like a little beak. Put your beak-hand right in front of your chin with the fingers pointing away from you. Make the beak open and close a few times.

gaps.reason: 'beak-hand' opening and closing does not anchor a palm direction — it could be palm-down (beak horizontal) or palm-ipsilateral (beak vertical)
gaps.suggested_question: Is the beak horizontal (palm down) or vertical (palm facing to the side)?

notes: Child-directed description — 'beak' is a common teaching metaphor for flat-O.
